title: Ubiquiti FlexHD-CM-3, Ceiling Mount for UniFi FlexHD and U6-Mesh, 3-pack
category: Ubiquiti FlexHD-CM-3, Ceiling Mount for UniFi FlexHD and U6-Mesh, 3-pack
description: Recessed ceiling mount accessory for the UniFi FLEX HD access point. Mount the UAP-FlexHD or U6-Mesh to a drop ceiling tile, drywall ceiling or solid ceiling for discreet, low profile appearance. Sliding retainer with locking threads and a snap-in mechanism for the UAP-FlexHD or U6-Mesh make mounting simple.
